1301 Walkertown Ave unit 101SWinston-SalemNC27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem.APPFOLIO_FREE21$85090

Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem.APPFOLIO_FREE21$85090

1961 Grand Park LnThomasvilleGA31757
THOMASVILLE, GEORGIA'S MOST EXCEPTIONAL APARTMENT COMMUNITY You are invited to be one of the first to call Grand Park Apartments home. We are Thomasville, Georgia's newest and most luxurious apartment community. From the moment you drive onto our manicured grounds to when you step into your new apartment home, you'll recognize this as the lifestyle you deserve. Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. Our dedicated, professional and friendly management and maintenance team is responsive to your needs. This is your time and Grand Parks is your place. Enjoy luxury living at Grand Parks. We invite you to schedule your personal tour today.APPFOLIO_FREE22$142548

502302 S 2nd St unit 202ChampaignIL61820
Amazing one beds! Completely renovated in 2019! Campus View is an 8 story building with 2 elevators, right on 2nd & White St. Prime location with a bus stop right outside the doors. This building was completely renovated in 2019 with luxury vinyl flooring, granite countertops, stainless steel appliance package with dishwasher, high speed fiber internet. Water and heat included in rent. This building also includes a Fitness center, study room, & a tenant lounge. Contact us today for a showing! 217-356-8750 Green Street Realty www.greenstrealty.comBUILDIUM11$117532

565381 Whitetail Lane unit 101JacksonMN56143
Sign a 12-month lease and receive 2 months of free rent, with flexible options to fit your needs if you sign a lease: *Option 1: Take 1 month free upfront, and apply the second month as a monthly discount over the remaining 11 months. *Option 2: Spread the full value of 2 months free evenly across all 12 months for consistent savings. Welcome to Belmont Heights, where contemporary design and natural beauty come together in a picturesque rural setting. Set on 36 acres, this new market rate development offers modern apartments and townhomes for those seeking upscale comfort just minutes from work. Designed with young professionals and families in mind, these spacious homes feature sleek finishes like quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and in-unit washers and dryers--all in the heart of the vibrant, outdoorsy Minnesota community. With easy access to Jackson's industrial park, scenic walking and biking trails, and the serene Des Moines River nearby, Belmont Heights brings you close to both nature and career opportunities. Discover a beautiful balance of work, play, and relaxation on one of the highest points in the city. Come home to Belmont Heights--where rural roots meet modern living. Phase 2 - The Heights II - Apartment Development Starting 2026APPFOLIO_FREE21$112530

Welcome to Belmont Heights, where contemporary design and natural beauty come together in a picturesque rural setting. Set on 36 acres, this new market rate development offers modern apartments and townhomes for those seeking upscale comfort just minutes from work. Designed with young professionals and families in mind, these spacious homes feature sleek finishes like quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and in-unit washers and dryers--all in the heart of the vibrant, outdoorsy Minnesota community. With easy access to Jackson's industrial park, scenic walking and biking trails, and the serene Des Moines River nearby, Belmont Heights brings you close to both nature and career opportunities. 595902 Romeria Dr unit 101AustinTX78757
Welcome to Sunset Palms, the place where modern living meets the true Austin lifestyle. Tucked into the trendy Brentwood neighborhood, this is the kind of community that makes every day feel fun, fresh, and effortlessly cool. Step into your newly renovated 1x1 home featuring sleek quartz countertops, designer cabinetry, wood-style flooring, and gorgeous ceramic finishes--all complemented by smart-home technology that puts comfort and convenience right at your fingertips. Here, you're surrounded by everything that makes Austin Austin: - Epoch Coffee for your morning fix - Michi Ramen and The Peached Tortilla for your foodie adventures - Pinthouse Pizza for the perfect slice - Breakaway Records and Austin's best thrift shops just minutes away Walk it, bike it, live it--Brentwood's charm and energy are all around you. Sunset Palms isn't just a place to live... it's a place to thrive. Come experience the best of Central Austin living!APPFOLIO_FREE11$83929

7087600 Blanco Rd unit 1102San AntonioTX78216
Welcome to The Escapade Apartments, your new home in the heart of San Antonio, TX. Our community offers a variety of amenities designed to enhance your living experience. Dive into one of our three sparkling swimming pools or keep up with your fitness goals in our well-equipped fitness center. For sports enthusiasts, our tennis court is ready for your next match. We also offer a convenient laundry facility, making your daily chores easier. Enjoy a fun-filled weekend at our BBQ area or take your furry friend to our dog park for some playtime. For those who work from home, our business center provides a professional environment for you to focus. Our 24-hour emergency maintenance ensures your comfort at all times. Plus, our walking trail is perfect for a leisurely stroll or a morning jog. Experience the best of San Antonio living at The Escapade Apartments.APPFOLIO_FREE11$120928

Dive into one of our three sparkling swimming pools or keep up with your fitness goals in our well-equipped fitness center. For sports enthusiasts, our tennis court is ready for your next match. We also offer a convenient laundry facility, making your daily chores easier. Enjoy a fun-filled weekend at our BBQ area or take your furry friend to our dog park for some playtime. For those who work from home, our business center provides a professional environment for you to focus. Our 24-hour emergency maintenance ensures your comfort at all times. Plus, our walking trail is perfect for a leisurely stroll or a morning jog. Experience the best of San Antonio living at The Escapade Apartments.APPFOLIO_FREE11$120928

Featuring fully remodeled apartments with GRANITE countertops, NEW cabinets, BLACK APPLIANCES, brand new remodeled bathrooms with luxury PORCELAIN tile bathtub enclosures, tile floors throughout, walk-in closets (select units), and much more. We offer affordable luxury in the heart of the USF area within a GATED COMMUNITY in the perfect location. The Wave Apartments is located minutes from The University of South Florida, University Mall, Moffitt Cancer Hospital, VA Hospital, AdventHealth, Shriners Hospitals, St. Joseph's Hospital, Florida Hospital, many restaurants, shopping, and much more. Amenities include a refreshing pool with sun deck, pet walking areas, 24 hour onsite laundry facility, 24 hour emergency maintenance, onsite management office, lots of free parking, and public transportation right out front. Availability is limited. Call now before they're gone!APPFOLIO_FREE11$107526

South Beach living at its best! Updated & Partially Furnished 530 sq ft. studio in South Beach with ocean view. Open Studio includes one full bath, open kitchen features granite counters, & stainless steel appliances (dishwasher, electric cooktop stove, & refrigerator). NEW AC, FRESH PAINTED. This is a beautiful high rise, updated lobby, resort style, amenities galore (directly across from the Ritz Carlton Hotel). Rent includes AC (Save on Electric bill) Basic Cable TV, Internet. It has a newer heated swimming pool overlooking the ocean, state of the art gym, valet parking with 24 hour security. Enjoy all that Famous Lincoln Rd has to offer!RentPath01$250025
869100 Lincoln Rd #1220Miami BeachFL33139
STUDIO, AT THE FAMOUS DECOPLAGE BUILDING WITHIN WALKING DISTANCE TO THE BEACH AND THE MOST TRENDY RESTAURANTS AND PLACES IN SOUTH BEACH. WHERE LINCOLN RD MEETS THE OCEAN, ACROSS FROM THE RITZ-CARLTON AND NEXT TO THE LOWS HOTEL. 870100 Lincoln Rd #1601Miami BeachFL33139
Ocean front, direct beach access, renovated large, bright and clean apartment at the Decoplage. All white quartz floors & countertops. White Glossy cabinets. Walk in Closet. Spa area with Rain Shower & glass doors. Make this your perfect Vacation spot or long term home. Sleeps 4. Fully Furnished. Rent includes water, high speed internet, digital cable TV, electricity, Gym, 1 valet parking for free, infinity heated pool, game room, library, piano, social lounge at the mezzanine and children play room. Fast online approval. $50 application fee. Condominium approval needed. Priced here for year lease. Call now for availability, pricing and showing appointment. Laundry rooms on every floor. Walking distance to shops, restaurants, Lincoln Mall, 11 miles to Miami International Airport. No Pets.RentPath01$250025

Very nice and well decorated Jr 1 bed apt at Decoplage condo! The apartment features south facing, tile floor all over, bath-tub shower, 1 queen bed + futon bed. Full amenities building in the best location in South Beach, heated pool, renovated gym and direct access to the beach. Rent includes 1 parking space thru valet, wifi, cable tv & electricity. Unit is available no less than 3 months up to 6 months rent (no yearly lease). Rent price changes depending on the length of the stay and the season, $2500 to $3000/mo.MARMLS01$250025
892100 Lincoln Rd unit 936Miami BeachFL33139
Designer junior bedroom with a gorgeous view of the ocean. Walk to the best restaurants and shops in South Beach. Across the street from the Ritz Carlton and next to the Lowes Hotel.Southeast exposure. Fully furnished.All utilities are included, Wifi Cable TV, electric bill and parking.MARMLS01$250025
893120 S Burdick St unit E-1StillwaterOK74074
Welcome to Wellsprings Apartments, your new home in the heart of Stillwater, OK. Our apartments are equipped with essential amenities such as a stove, dishwasher, and refrigerator, ensuring a comfortable and convenient living experience. We also offer unique features that set us apart. Enjoy full access to our club house, perfect for socializing and relaxing. For outdoor enthusiasts, our family picnic sites are ideal for a sunny afternoon. As a resident of Wellsprings Apartments, you'll receive a complimentary membership to White Barn Estates for the duration of your lease. This membership opens up a world of recreational activities. Test your skills on the Par-3 golf course or the mini golf course (please note, golf carts are not included but can be rented for $15.00). Engage in a friendly match at the sand volleyball court or unwind with some catch and release fishing. We understand that pets are part of the family, which is why we welcome them with a deposit. Stay connected with our Wi-Fi service, ensuring you're never out of touch. At Wellsprings Apartments, we provide more than just a place to live, we offer a lifestyle. Come and join our community today!APPFOLIO_FREE01$90025

918555 N Dean Rd unit A-01AuburnAL36830
Welcome to The Vue on Dean, where you'll find a variety of appealing living spaces to suit your needs. Whether you're looking for a cozy 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom retreat or a roomier 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom haven, we have the perfect home for you. All our units come with the convenience of in-unit laundry facilities, making chores a breeze. If you're seeking a shared living arrangement, our 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom layout is ideal for roommates, as both bedrooms are generously sized and boast their own 3-piece bathrooms for added privacy. The Vue on Dean offers a range of amenities to enhance your living experience. Enjoy the serenity of our beautifully landscaped grounds, take a dip in the refreshing swimming pool, or stay active in our fitness center. In your apartment, you'll find modern touches like granite countertops, a dishwasher, and a microwave, simplifying your daily routine. Pet lovers will appreciate our dog park and pet-friendly policies, ensuring that your furry family members feel right at home here. Experience the convenience and comfort of our community while enjoying the peace and quiet that comes with living in this lovely setting. Make this your new home and discover all that our complex has to offer. Please call our VUE representative at 334-752-0021 for more details or to schedule a tour time.APPFOLIO_FREE22$162525
